title: Find My Device - Moving in and out of range
scenario: Find My Device map pin transitions to grey and shows "Out of range" view when headset moves out of Bluetooth range, then returns to blue "Nearby" view upon reconnection
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
2. Ensure a Poly Bluetooth headset is paired and connected.
3. Navigate to the Find My Device feature from the Home screen or Account screen.
4. Move the paired headset out of Bluetooth range (e.g., walk away until disconnection occurs).
5. Observe the app's Find My Device view and the map pin color.
6. Move the headset back into Bluetooth range (e.g., walk back near the phone).
7. Wait for the headset to automatically reconnect.
8. Observe the app's Find My Device view and the map pin color again.
expected: When the headset moves out of range, the app shows an 'Out of range' view and the map pin turns grey. When the headset moves back into range, it reconnects, shows a 'Nearby' view, and the map pin turns blue.
